examples: Her smile betrayed her true feelings

meanings.definition: deliver to an enemy by treachery
disappoint, prove undependable to; abandon, forsake
examples: His sense of smell failed him this time
His children failed him in the crisis

meanings.definition: be sexually unfaithful to one's partner in marriage

examples: He told on his classmate who had cheated on the exam

meanings.definition: cause someone to believe an untruth
examples: The insurance company deceived me when they told me they were covering my house
